description: Synthetic Long Term Assignment Policy Summary table (pipe columns). Mirrors typical section refs 2.1 / 3.2 / 4.1 / 5.2 / 6.5 / 7.1 / 8.3 without embedding refs in benefit text.

items.text: Immigration and visas | Company supports work permits and visa processing for the assignee and accompanying family members. | 2.1
Relocation allowance | Assignee USD 8000 / each dependant USD 2000 one-time lump sum. | 3.2
Spouse career support | Dual career coaching allowance paid per global mobility policy (not a housing benefit). | 4.1
Child education | Tuition difference reimbursement for dependent children where eligible under the program. | 5.2
Temporary living | Temporary accommodation in the host location up to 30 days maximum. | 6.5
Home leave | Home leave: standard assignment / split family / dependant in education / rest and recuperation | 7.1
Host housing | Host country housing benefit capped using third party benchmark data (no fixed cash stipend). | 8.3
